data.title: ComplianceCow Announces Integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management to Automate Continuous Control Monitoring for Enterprises
data.description: In San Francisco, ComplianceCow revealed a new partnership with ServiceNow, a leading AI platform for business transformation. This collaboration aims to provide automated processes for evidence collection, controls testing, remediation, and graph analysis in IT and cybersecurity domains. ComplianceCow stands out as the sole agentic Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) middleware solution that utilizes generative AI to swiftly enhance controls. This integration enables users to accelerate their controls with the help of advanced technology.
US Trade Representative Greer: I am having conversations with Canada and Mexico about rules of origin for steel.
Hezbollah, in their first comment on the truce: Any ceasefire must not allow Israel freedom of movement within Lebanon.
US Trade Representative Greer is preparing the text for a plurilateral agreement with a select group on critical minerals, including a price floor.
5 Counterparties Take USD158 Mln At Fed Reverse Repo Op. (prev USD223 Mln, 6 Bids)
Israeli Officials: The ceasefire in Lebanon was imposed on Israel - Israeli Channel 13.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Dr. Thomas Lewis Matthew as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Washington, Dr. Thomas Lewis Matthew was highlighted in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member. He is celebrated for his outstanding achievements in Cardiothoracic Surgery and Leadership. Dr. Thomas Lewis Matthew stands out as a significant contributor in the field.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Dr. Craig Minor as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Tomball, Texas, Dr. Craig Minor was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence for his remarkable work in Leading Visionary Nursing Innovation at Houston Methodist. Dr. Minor's significant contributions have placed him at the forefront of cutting-edge advancements in healthcare.

data.title: Cloud Storage Security and InfoScale Partner to Deliver Real-Time Cyber Resilience for Enterprise Data
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in ROCHESTER, N.Y., Cloud Storage Security (CSS) introduced a groundbreaking approach. They proposed blending instantaneous resilience with built-in malware validation to enable organizations to exclusively reinstate trustworthy data. This method aims at lowering the possibility of reinfection and expediting incident response times. By implementing this innovative strategy, CSS looks to revolutionize data security protocols and offer a more secure storage solution for clients.

data.title: Prince Edward County Public Schools Expands Access to Mental Health Support for Students
data.description: In Natick, Massachusetts, on April 16, 2026, a collaboration was announced between Uwill and PECPS to offer enhanced counseling services for students in grades K-12. The partnership aims to provide teletherapy and crisis support to all students within the Prince Edward County Public Schools system. This initiative brings additional support for students in need, highlighting the importance of mental health services in schools.

data.title: 'Officially Amazing': FM Earns a Guinness World Records Title for Largest Display of Fire Sprinklers
data.description: A collection of 1,007 sprinkler devices has been showcased at the FM Research Campus in Rhode Island, illustrating the company's commitment to property protection for almost 200 years. Located in Johnston, R.I., this display reflects FM's enduring mission to safeguard properties. The 1,007 sprinkler devices serve as a testament to the company's longstanding dedication to property protection. This showcase aligns with FM's philosophy and emphasizes their focus on safeguarding assets and infrastructure.

data.title: Evergreen Digital Media Inc. and Digi Point Media LLC. Announce Strategic Capital and Content Management Partnership
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Evergreen Digital Media Inc. (EDM), a leading digital signage and retail media networks operator, and Digi Point Marketing LLC. (DPM) completed a strategic partnership to support the national growth of the Icebox Network, an advertising platform.

data.title: Charles Schwab will enable retail clients to trade Bitcoin and Ether directly, marking its first foray into spot trading.
data.description: Schwab is set to launch direct trading in the top two cryptocurrencies through a specialized account, marking its initial foray into spot trading as it broadens its digital asset options. This move aims to cater to investors looking to trade in popular cryptos directly through Schwab's platform. The decision comes as the crypto market continues to surge, with Bitcoin reaching new highs and Ethereum following suit. Schwab's introduction of direct trading in these top two cryptos signifies a strategic step towards embracing the growing trend of digital assets among investors.

data.title: Charles Schwab considering adding prediction markets with Bitcoin, Ethereum trading close to launch. CEO Rick Wurster says.
data.description: Rick Wurster, the President and CEO of Charles Schwab, stated that the company, the largest discount brokerage firm in America, is considering backing prediction markets.

data.title: Seabrook Island Stands Apart as a More Residential Alternative Along the Charleston Coast
data.description: In Seabrook Island, South Carolina, Pam Harrington explains the growing appeal for buyers due to the privacy, simplicity, and affordability it offers in the coastal real estate market. The area has seen a rise in interest with an increasing number of people looking for a more attainable entry point into the market. This trend is particularly notable along the Charleston coast. The development in Seabrook Island is attracting buyers with its privacy and simplicity, making it a popular choice among individuals seeking a retreat in a coastal setting.

data.title: ACMI Secures $50 Million Award to Accelerate Production Innovation in Energetics
data.description: A company called ACMI Federal has revealed that it secured a $50 million contract from Naval Surface Warfare Center Indian Head Division (NSWC IHD) for the purpose of enhancing energetics capabilities through a joint research and development initiative. Additionally, ACMI intends to construct the Maryland Energetics Innovation Hub (MEIH) in close proximity to NSWC IHD. The MEIH is anticipated to facilitate collaboration among industry, academia, and various other entities.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Pricing of $1,000 million of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2031
data.description: In Livingston, New Jersey, CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV) disclosed details of a private offering, pricing $1,000 million in aggregate principal amount of 9.750% senior notes due in 2031. The maturity date for these Notes is set for October 1, 2031. The closing of this offering is anticipated to take place on April 21, 2026, pending standard closing conditions. The Notes will be issued at an issue price of 102.000% of their principal amount.
AB Science releases latest data on its medical trials, featuring critical milestones.

data.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Announces Shareholder Investigation of ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI)
data.description: Law firm Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP has disclosed an inquiry into ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI) on April 16, 2026, to represent the interests of the company's shareholders. The investigation is centered on evaluating potential breaches of fiduciary responsibilities by ICU Medical's directors. The examination aims to determine if the directors acted in the best interests of the shareholders and the company amidst undisclosed figures and undisclosed market conditions.

data.title: As Agentic AI Adoption Accelerates, Rubrik Warns of Growing Security Gaps
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, a new study by Rubrik Zero Labs reveals that the deployment of AI agents in enterprises is progressing faster than the ability to protect them. Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) released the report, which highlights that organizations are implementing autonomous systems without sufficient security measures in place, leading to a disconnect between advancement and safety. The research, based on a survey of over 1,600 IT and security executives, indicates that 86% anticipate AI agents surpassing the ability to secure them effectively.
